name: chart
title: Chart
description: Shared chart chrome: sized frame with empty and loading states, token tooltip surface, and legend. Compose plot primitives inside the frame.

files.content:
export {
  formatChartDate,
  formatChartNumber,
  type ChartDateGranularity,
} from "./format"
export {
  CHART_HEIGHT_TOKENS,
  CHART_SERIES_TOKENS,
  chartSeriesColor,
  chartTheme,
  type ChartFrameSize,
  type ChartSeriesToken,
  type ChartTheme,
} from "./theme"
export {
  polylinePath,
  projectSeriesToSvg,
  remainingFromBurns,
  seriesBounds,
  type ChartBounds,
  type ChartPoint,
  type ChartSeries,
  type SvgPoint,
} from "./series"
